ready: color=1,0,0,1 bold=true 
busy: color=1,0,0,1 
div-ready: 
missing:

token-miss: 
dash-hit: bold=true 
dash-exact: bold=true 
dash-miss: 
prefix-hit: fontSize=18 
prefix-miss:

suffix-miss:
